filename_convention: Uses .htm extension per SEC EDGAR's 25+-year convention. Production input from EDGAR always ends in .htm; fixture matches so any extension-aware tooling behaves identically in tests and live.
note: Real EDGAR 10-K for MSFT, fiscal period FY2022, filed 2022-07-28. Public-domain SEC filing. Trimmed via scripts/build_chunking_fixture.py to fit the 500 KB pre-commit cap while preserving real section headers for Item 1A, Item 7, Item 8 in document order and at least one inline financial table for Item 8 table-policy tests.
tier_rationale: MSFT FY2022 — table-cell layout template with font-weight:normal headers; important variance but slow.
